forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
reset_password_success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
collector_subtitle: Enter your email and the access code provided by the parent.
collector_code_hint: This 6-digit code was given to you by the parent who authorized you.
collector_pin_subtitle: Enter your PIN to access your authorizations.
terms_accept: I accept the Terms and Conditions of Securi'Click.
privacy_accept: I have read the Privacy Policy and consent to the processing of my data.
welcome_subtitle: A few important points before you start
welcome_data_body: We only collect the data necessary for the service: name, email, phone, and profile photos. No data is sold or shared with third parties. Securely hosted via Supabase (EU).
welcome_children_body: Information entered about children is strictly reserved for managing their pickups. It is only accessible to people explicitly authorized by the parent.
welcome_notif_body: Push notifications are used exclusively to inform you of events related to your account. You can disable them at any time.
welcome_delete_body: You can permanently delete your account and all your data from Profile → Security.
welcome_rgpd_body: Processing compliant with GDPR (EU) 2016/679. You have the right to access, modify, and delete your data. Contact: contact@securi-click.com
error_email_used: This email is already in use.
error_link_expired: Link expired or already used. Request a new one.
error_pin_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
error_account_not_found: No account found with this email.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
delete_account_message:
This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

Are you sure you want to delete your account?
biometric_unavailable: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
